title: Minecraft Bedrock Aim Assist Preset 1.21.120
description: A camera aim-assist preset definition for a behavior pack.

camera_aim_assist_preset_definition.title: Camera Aim Assist Preset Definition
camera_aim_assist_preset_definition.description: A single Camera Aim-Assist Preset Definition.

identifier.description: Namespaced identifier for Camera Aim-Assist preset. Namespace and name must be separated by a ':'.

default_item_settings.description: Optional. Default Aim-Assist Category used for Items not found in 'item_settings'.

hand_settings.description: Optional. Aim-Assist Category used for an empty hand.

exclusion_settings.description: Optional. List of block/entity identifiers to exclude from aim assist targeting.

item_settings.description: Optional. Map of Item identifiers to Aim-Assist Category names found in the specified 'categories'.

liquid_targeting_list.description: Optional. List of item identifiers that will target liquid blocks with aim-assist when being held.

exclusion_entry.title: Exclusion Entry
exclusion_entry.description: An entry in the exclusion list for aim assist targeting.

blocks.description: Block identifiers to exclude from aim assist targeting.

block_tags.description: Block tags to exclude from aim assist targeting.

entities.description: Entity identifiers to exclude from aim assist targeting.

entity_type_families.description: Entity type families to exclude from aim assist targeting.
